title: After restart, latest develop loses language tags
description: After update to fa9e8ca from ea35084, all language tags went missing from the database. I had to reload the data to fix it.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE language_tags (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, tag VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO language_tags (id, tag) VALUES (1, 'en'), (2, 'fr'), (3, 'de'), (4, NULL), (5, 'es');
UPDATE language_tags SET tag = 'it' WHERE id = 3;
SELECT DISTINCT tag, CASE WHEN tag IS NOT NULL THEN tag ELSE 'unknown' END AS lang FROM language_tags;
DELETE FROM language_tags WHERE tag IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Latest develop loses language tags after restart
